title: Egyptian Muslim Brotherhood's Rise and Fall
description: The narrative revolves around the Egyptian Muslim Brotherhood's attempt to consolidate power after the ousting of President Mubarak in 2011. Islamist movement officials, including Mohamed Morsi, promised not to run for office if they were part of a transition government. However, when Morsi became president, he made significant changes, such as sacking the military's top brass, which drew criticism from both supporters and opponents.
